title: Healthcare Analytics Sales Motion
background: A healthcare analytics company wants to sell into hospital systems but has a long sales cycle.
candidate_prompt: How would you evaluate the situation and recommend what the organization should do next?
good_answer_includes: Defines target segments and buyer personas
Chooses channels, messaging, and sales motion
Considers pricing, enablement, and launch sequencing
great_answer_includes: Aligns GTM motion with deal size and buying process
Identifies early adopter segments and proof points
Considers partner and direct channel tradeoffs
Defines pipeline, conversion, and retention metrics
interviewer_notes: A strong candidate should use a clear go-to-market structure, isolate the most important drivers, and connect the recommendation to business impact.
